name: project-cli
shortDescription: A simple CLI with short description of what this Python project does.
longDescription: A powerful command-line interface tool built with Python that streamlines developer workflows. Designed for speed, extensibility, and developer experience.
features: Key feature or capability of the project

content.text: project-cli is a production-ready CLI framework that helps you build powerful command-line tools with minimal boilerplate. It handles argument parsing, configuration, logging, and plugin architecture out of the box.

pip install project-cli

# Or from source:
git clone https://github.com/buckethq/project-cli
cd project-cli && pip install -e .
Create a new CLI project in seconds:

project-cli init my-tool
cd my-tool
project-cli run
Use a simple YAML or JSON config file to customize behavior:

# config.yaml
project:
  name: my-tool
  version: 0.1.0
commands:
  - name: build
    handler: ./handlers/build.py

items: ⚡ Zero-config argument parsing with type validation

content.text: Built for developers who want to ship tools, not fight frameworks.
Contributions are welcome! Check out the source repo for issues, PRs, and the contributor guide.
